_meta: Nagaland (Nagamese) — requires human translator from the congregation. English shown as fallback until updated in Sanity or this file.

home.hero_h1: God raised Jesus from the dead.
home.hero_h2: There is hope for all who follow him.
home.series_desc: Exploring the sheer goodness of Jesus — his words, his power, his compassion, and what he is willing and able to do for us today.
home.welcome_body: Lake Shore Church is a community of believers meeting in Chicago's West Loop. We are a scripture-teaching, Jesus-following, community-building church. Everyone is welcome — wherever you are on your journey of faith.
home.pastor_daily: Pastor Brian shares a scripture every day. Follow us to stay connected throughout the week.
home.ready_next_step: Ready to take your next step?
home.join_this_sunday: Join us this Sunday at 10:00 AM. Everyone is welcome.

worship.title: Worship
worship.body: God planned your life for His glory and pleasure.

grow.title: Grow
grow.body: God created you to become a devoted disciple of Jesus Christ.

serve.title: Serve
serve.body: God gifted you to serve Him in His church and our city.

give.title: Give to Lake Shore Church
give.subtitle: Support our ministry in the West Loop
give.page_desc: Thank you for your generous support.
give.building_desc: Help us establish our church home
give.missions_desc: Reach the world with the gospel
give.zero_fees: 100% of your gift goes directly to the church. No platform fees.
give.zeffy_soon: Online giving via Zeffy will be available soon. Use the QR code below or contact the church office.

prayer.title: Prayer Requests
prayer.subtitle: Submit a prayer request. We pray for every one.
prayer.page_desc: We would be honored to pray with you.
prayer.success: Your prayer has been received. We will pray for you.

visit.title: Plan a Visit
visit.subtitle: We'd love to see you this Sunday.
visit.page_desc: We would love to meet you.
visit.expect_1: Arrive a few minutes early — greeters will welcome you.
visit.expect_2: Join in worship and prayer with the congregation.
visit.expect_3: Listen to biblical teaching from God's Word.
visit.expect_4: Stay for coffee and conversation — we would love to get to know you.
visit.parking_desc: Street parking and public transit are available in the West Loop. Plan extra time on Sunday mornings.

language.title_multilingual: Language / 语言 / 言語 / மொழி / Wika / Nagamese
